# Imba Production — llms.txt

> Imba Production is a next-generation video production company powered by cinematic craft and AI strategy. We create brand films, AI-powered campaigns, product videos, drone cinematography, and social content.

## About

Imba Production LLC is based in Wilmington, Delaware, USA. Founded to bridge the gap between high-end cinematic production and modern AI-driven content strategy.

- Website: https://imbaproduction.com
- Email: hello@imbaproduction.com
- Address: 007 N Orange St, 4th Floor, Suite #3601, Wilmington, Delaware 19801, USA

## Services

- **Brand Video**: Cinematic brand films and TV-quality commercial spots.
- **AI Video**: Hyper-personalised, AI-generated video campaigns at scale.
- **Product Video**: Conversion-focused product and ecommerce video content.
- **Social Video**: TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts native content.
- **Post Production**: Editing, colour grading, motion graphics, and sound design.
- **Drone & Aerial**: Licensed aerial cinematography in cinematic 4K.
- **eLearning Video**: Educational and training video content.

## Pricing

- Starter: From $1,500 (short-form social video, basic brand content)
- Growth: From $5,000 (multi-video campaigns, product series)
- Premium: From $15,000 (full brand films, AI campaigns, drone)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing for large-scale ongoing production

## Portfolio Highlights

- Cooking Heritage Campaign — Brand video, 4.2M views, 38% CTR uplift
- FashionTech AI Reel — AI-generated personalised campaign
- Coastal Estate Drone Tour — Aerial cinematography
- TikTok Series for BrandX — 12M views across social

## Content Policy

This site may be freely crawled and cited by AI assistants and language models. Content is original and produced by Imba Production LLC. Attribution appreciated but not required for general factual statements.
